response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical expertise, open-source contributions, and leadership in software development, aligning well with the technical and architectural aspects of the role. However, his experience is more hands-on and less focused on executive-level leadership, strategic client advisory, or team mentorship at scale, which are critical for this position. His German language proficiency is also below the required C1 level.
strengths: Extensive experience in full-stack development, architecture design, and open-source technologies (e.g., GISCollective, Linux/Unix environments).
Proven track record in technical leadership roles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer, founder) and contributions to complex systems (e.g., real-time data processing, AI-agent infrastructure).
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing skills, evidenced by workshops, talks, and community engagement.
concerns: Limited explicit experience in executive-level leadership, strategic client advisory, or large-scale team mentorship.
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' below the required C1 level for the role.
Most recent roles are heavily technical (e.g., full-stack development, AI infrastructure) with less emphasis on IT consulting or digital sovereignty.
